MS-INIT-001.title: Initialize the common project skeleton
why: establish a unified AGENTS Collaboration rules and basic engineering structure,Let all participants work under the same specifications
Reduce execution deviations caused by different process understandings when adding tasks or modules in the future,Reduce collaboration friction
Make project key rules traceable,automatic verification,And have clear audit capabilities
Automatically check project status with scriptable tools,Reduce the hidden risks caused by relying on verbal agreements
Provide a stable and compatible initialization basis for subsequent expansion of new standard files or modules
what: Establish AGENTS,BACKGROUND,MILESTONE,CHANGE,TREE Minimum usable templates for five types of core documents
get through tree,baseline_refresh,verify_rules Three core scripts,Make it form a complete execution process
Implement the basic capabilities of the local visualization workbench,Support document reading,edit,Save and preview
Establish an automatic indexing mechanism for the project directory structure and file tree,ensure TREE Files are kept in sync with real directories
Initialize the first baseline document and final inspection status document of the project,Provide a reference for subsequent calibration
how: First define various document field structures according to the constraint template,Repopulate minimal executable sample data
implement tree sync Build project TREE document,Record the current directory structure
implement baseline_refresh Generate project baseline,Used for comparison of future changes
Test document reading on the visual page,edit,Is the saving and preview process complete and available?
run finalize Execute rule verification,and automatically fix all fixable issues
Play back the complete initialization process,and record the results of the initialization phase to CHANGE in file
verify: run python agents_tools/tree.py sync After the script is executed successfully,No error reported
run python agents_tools/baseline_refresh.py return after status=ok
run python agents_tools/verify_rules.py finalize --json return after status=ok
Visual pages can be loaded and displayed correctly MILESTONE,CHANGE,TREE Three types of core documents
TREE All new nodes in the file contain non-empty note Field,And the structure is consistent with the real directory
notes: The current milestone is only used to complete the general project initialization phase
Before adding a new milestone,It is necessary to confirm that the template fields are consistent with the rule verification logic
If you modify the read-only constraint file,Need to be executed first baseline_refresh Update baseline
After initialization is completed,Can continue to expand new business milestones based on this node
This node will serve as a reference starting point for subsequent flow chart generation and rule verification.
